## What changed

Explain the change in plain language.

## Type of change

- [ ] New tool / resource
- [ ] Prompt addition
- [ ] Link fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Script / automation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not remove existing working URLs
- [ ] I did not add exaggerated income or ranking promises
- [ ] I verified the new links open correctly
- [ ] I kept the change minimal and focused

## Data validation

List any fields you added or corrected (name, url, category, pricing, description, tags, last_checked).
